# BriefTube

> BriefTube is a free AI-powered YouTube summarizer that turns any YouTube video into accurate, AI-generated summaries, transcripts, and study notes in seconds.

BriefTube extracts key points, timestamps, and notes from tutorials, lectures, podcasts, interviews, and educational videos. Summaries can be exported as PDF, Markdown, or TXT.

## Main Pages

- [Home](https://brieftube.co/): Generate an AI summary from any YouTube video URL.
- [Blog](https://brieftube.co/blog): Articles on AI tools, productivity, and learning.
- [About](https://brieftube.co/about): Information about BriefTube and its mission.
- [Contact](https://brieftube.co/contact): Get in touch with the BriefTube team.
- [FAQ](https://brieftube.co/faq): Frequently asked questions about BriefTube.

## Products

- [AI YouTube Summarizer](https://brieftube.co/): Converts YouTube videos into concise AI-generated summaries.
- YouTube Transcript Generator: Extracts full transcripts from YouTube videos.
- AI Study Assistant: Turns video content into structured study notes.

## Topics

Artificial Intelligence, AI Tools, YouTube Learning, Productivity, Students, Education, Coding, Programming, Study Tips, Online Learning, Technology

BriefTube Team
